productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Superstar 11 White Casual Shoes
description: With a shell toe and edgy nylon camouflage upper inspired by the Battle of Hoth, the Superstar 2 SW from adidas originals makes this shoe offer a rebellious ride. With pops of orange reminiscent of Luke's X-Wing flight suit, a Rogue Squadron tongue badge and Rebel Alliance heel patch and print, this shoe is a must have in the wradrobe of all Star Wars fans.This shoe comes with an extra pair of laces in contrast colour.UpperTextile upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides of the midfoot Ridged and grooved toe capLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for breathable comfort and optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded EVA midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface using a dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
